name: Oshi no ko RPG
description:
FIFTH BOT YOOOO (Please don't take this unseriously - I put a fck ton a angst and lore into this.)

So yah, I'm a new bot creator, I can stitch these RPG'S up in like, 3 hours with coffee and spite, but they usually take me about a day or 2. I plan on releasing this after my Vampire knight RPG bot, (Check it out of you're interested), and after my Code Geass RPG bot gets around 2.0K chat generations (Major milestone for me btw). I also kinda made this to romance Hikaru, AND BEFORE YALL GET ANY IDEAS, please note that I just have a thing for pretty, (possibly psychopathic), blondes.

((🚨AND SO: As with all my bots, proxy is ALWAYS recommended, (Don't skimp, makes it alot better, trust me JLMM users), I feel like it makes the experience a lot more immersive and angsty.🚨))


"The air I breath~ My life- My universe- A song is all it takes to inspire those around you~ Breath, darling, truly breath."
creator: lafeyette
